Traction

Pre-seed stage. Real foundations.

We are pre-revenue, building the infrastructure and pilot track record that unlocks the carbon market opportunity. Here is what is real and verified today.

Pilot projects

The first step in our onboarding process. We review every application personally.

Onboarded to Crevy · active documentation

3
Ghana active · Nigeria pipeline for Q2 2027

Hectares documented

Verified evidence trail in Crevy for thousands of hectares of carbon projects.

Under active MRV documentation

3,620 ha
Agriculture · forestry · waste project types

Projected 2026 revenue

Revenue in 2026 will come from pilot projects and early platform fees as we build the foundation for growth.

Financial model · advisor-reviewed

$28k
Break-even projected 2028 · stress-tested model

Foundation work complete

The legal, compliance, and evidence-gathering foundation for a credible carbon platform.

Compliance, legal & evidence base

✓ Legal infrastructure — Privacy Policy, T&Cs, MOU templates
✓ Financial model reviewed & stress-tested by finance advisor
✓ Theory of Change — 16 published references, impact-advisor reviewed
✓ 25% community benefit-sharing — required for all projects
The product moat

We're not a marketplace. We're the verification layer.

The defensible asset in carbon markets is not the trading interface it is the verified evidence trail. Crevy is built to create that trail for African projects that have never had access to it.

3

Pilot projects onboarded

Three projects are actively onboarded to Crevy and building their verification evidence trail the hardest part of launching a carbon platform in Africa.

3,620 ha

Hectares under active documentation

Project developers are documenting sustainable practices across 3,620 hectares spanning Northern Savanna, Bono, and Ameyawkope farmlands measured and evidenced for the first time.

3

Carbon economies covered

Green, Blue, and Brown carbon project types are all supported on the platform. Agriculture, energy, and waste the early-stage projects global buyers cannot easily reach or verify on their own.

16

Published references behind our Theory of Change

Our Theory of Change has been reviewed and updated with our impact advisor, underpinned by 16 published references. Every impact claim we make is evidenced.

Business model

Three fee streams. One platform.

Every dollar of revenue is attached to real carbon infrastructure work, not arbitrage. As the market grows, so do our take rates.

$13.32Project owner · 72% of credit value
$2.78Foovante platform fee · 15%
$1.85Verification & issuance · 10%
$0.55Methodology & spec costs
Per $18.50 credit · illustrative

Three platform-fee streams.

  • 72%To project owners. The highest payout rate in African carbon. Projects keep the majority of what their work generates.
  • 15%Platform fee. Covers MRV monitoring, project listing, marketplace, and T+1 settlement. ~$2.78 per tCO₂e at platform-average pricing.
  • 10%Verification & issuance. Passed through at cost to your chosen standard body: Verra, Gold Standard, or Plan Vivo.

Ready to see the data room?

We share financials, cap table, investor update, and full technical documentation with thesis-aligned funds. Drop your details and we'll send access within one business day.
